name: RMW - FN P90
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - An avantgarde take on the bullpup design. Well known PDW made for close quarters. Looks like alien tech. Ejects at bottom. Mag is on top and overall its just a gun that screams "look, im unique" and it pretty much is. Over all a very lovely PDW. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
